title: Wushi
short_description: A one-button platformer: auto-run left to right, jump to stay on platforms, with automatic double-jump saves.
description: Wushi is a one-button game. The player controlled character automatically moves from left to right and the player can press a button to jump. The goal is to survive as long as possible without falling off the platforms. After scarcely missing the edge of a platform, the character automatically saves himself with a double jump (which can't be initiated by the player).
